content:
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the National Land Code (Validation)
Act 2003.
Validation

Validation
2. Every act or thing done by the Land Executive Committee of the
Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur under section 42, subsection
56(4) and sections 68A, 75A, 75B, 75E, 75F, 75G, 92B, 92C, 92D, 92E,
92F, 92G, 124A, 129, 204B, 204E, 433B and 433E of the National Land
Code before the commencement of this Act until the coming into
operation of the delegation of powers under section 13 of the
National Land Code [P.U. (B) 108/2003] that would have been
lawful if the Land Executive Committee had been delegated to
perform such act or thing under those provisions is hereby validated
and declared to have been lawfully done.
6
